name: garflemn
message: Having worked with other mod-for-hire developers, the service that Mr Bonker gave us was absolutely phenomenal; easy to work with, friendly, truly one of a kind. Our mod Stardew Fishing has gained 7 million downloads(!!!) over the last two years, throughout which he has provided clear and effective communication and exemplified a real passion for the Craft (so to speak). If you've got an idea you want to see realised, I can't recommend his services enough.

name: Just Conquran
message: I've commissioned a mod from Bonker and overall I'm very happy with how it became an upgrade in a modpack thanks to the properties it already had. Any time an update were needed he were willing to make changes and respond FAST, overall very good impression as a first ever mod developer commission.

name: Zachary
message: I commissioned bonker for a videogame mod, in which he handled all the coding, artwork, and implementation. He was very active in receiving feedback, design, and was excellent in communication. He also delivered and hit milestones far quicker than anticipated and to a very high quality level. I couldn't be happier with his work and plan on contracting him in the future for further projects!
